description: A wrapper around a global cable.

connectToGlobalModulator.description: Connects the cable to a global LFO modulation output as source.

connectToMacroControl.signature: void connectToMacroControl(int macroIndex, bool macroIsTarget, bool filterRepetitions)
connectToMacroControl.description: Connects the cable to a macro control.

connectToModuleParameter.signature: void connectToModuleParameter(String processorId, var parameterIndexOrId, var targetObject)
connectToModuleParameter.description: Connects the cable to a module parameter using a JSON object for defining the range.

deregisterCallback.description: Deregisteres a callback from the cable.

getValue.description: Returns the value (converted to the input range).

registerCallback.description: Registers a function that will be executed whenever a value is sent through the cable.

registerDataCallback.description: Registers a function that will be executed asynchronously when the data receives a JSON data chunk.

sendData.description: Sends any type of data (JSON, string, buffers) to the target.

setRange.description: Set the input range using a min and max value (no steps / no skew factor).

setRangeWithSkew.signature: void setRangeWithSkew(double min, double max, double midPoint)
setRangeWithSkew.description: Set the input range using a min and max value and a mid point for skewing the range.

setRangeWithStep.signature: void setRangeWithStep(double min, double max, double stepSize)
setRangeWithStep.description: Set the input range using a min and max value as well as a step size.

setValue.description: Sends the value to all targets (after converting it from the input range.

setValueNormalised.description: Sends the normalised value to all targets.
